changes.summary: Canonical domain VoteCommentResolverService: vote-first resolve(id) via VoteService.getVoteById before CommentService.getComment; returns ResolvedVoteComment with vote, comment, snapshot, authorId; INV-14 documented on class and resolve().

Adapter-boundary VoteCommentResolver (BC-04/BC-18) owns the vote-first comment ID bridge; resolve() delegates to domain; resolveEntity() maps vote|comment entity for read paths; fromTrpcContext(ctx) factory for tRPC wiring without Nest DI; INV-14 enforced at adapter entry points.

notes: Attempt 3 confirms write-set deliverable from attempt 2 (tsc/lint/static passed; prior LLM partial was infra path mismatch for verdict_llm.scratch.yaml). Worktree also wires comments.getById to VoteCommentResolver.fromTrpcContext(ctx).resolveEntity() and api-v1 shim re-exports domain service (outside write_set). Follow-up: register VoteCommentResolver in AdaptersModule, VoteCommentResolverService in DomainModule, export from adapters/resolvers/index.ts.
